ss01.description: A double storey g adds personality, but makes the overall feel of the face slightly less consistent.
ss01.label: Double Storey g

ss02.description: A single storey a gives the feel of the face more consistent, but takes away some of the horizontal focus and overall visual interest.
ss02.label: Single Storey Aa

ss03.description: The lowercaps e brings in more of a fun feeling, but adds complexity and negative space to a letter that usually provides structure.
ss03.label: Lowercaps E

ss04.description: The crossed t adds a visual reference to the original logo, but takes away some of the consistency in the letter group jft.
ss04.label: Crossed t

ss05.description: Straight terminals bring more harmony to the typeface, but remove the 13 degree anchor that's present throughout the typeface.
ss05.label: Straight terminals
